top_signals.title: Fake Paysafe, Skrill SDKs on NPM and PyPi steal credentials
top_signals.summary: Malicious packages on the Node Package Manager (npm) and the Python Package Index (PyPI) delivered stealer malware to developers and users of Paysafe, Skrill, and Neteller payment applications. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Shoppers splurge on specs in Japan as deflation-era mindset fades away
top_signals.summary: As inflation reshapes behavior, Japanese eyeglass company Jins is working to prove higher prices are justified by delivering better materials, sharper designs and improved quality.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Speech by Commissioner Várhelyi at the Conference on Animal Health Law
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 08 Jul 2026 Good morning, ladies and gentlemen,
Welcome to this conference on the Animal Health Law.
It is a pleasure to welcome such a broad range of partners today - from...
